source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Permafrost
upgrades.description: Bloons move slowly even after thawing out.

upgrades.name: Cold Snap
upgrades.description: Can freeze and pop Lead and Camo Bloons.

upgrades.name: Ice Shards
upgrades.description: Removes Camo and Regrow properties when damaging Bloons. Razor sharp shards fly out when Frozen Bloons pop.

upgrades.name: Embrittlement
upgrades.description: Can hit MOAB-class Bloons. All hit Bloons become brittle, taking extra damage while frozen, and losing Lead immunity for a short time.

upgrades.name: Super Brittle
upgrades.description: Bloons take huge damage while frozen, while Ice Shards rip through Ceramic Bloons like paper!

upgrades.name: Enhanced Freeze
upgrades.description: Attacks faster and freezes for longer.

upgrades.name: Deep Freeze
upgrades.description: Increases pierce, freezes an extra layer and freeze lasts longer.

upgrades.name: Arctic Wind
upgrades.description: Gains a super cold aura that slows Bloons and freezes water nearby.

upgrades.name: Snowstorm
upgrades.description: Snowstorm Ability: Freezes all regular Bloons on screen, briefly freezes White, Zebra, and Camo, and slows MOAB-class.

upgrades.name: Absolute Zero
upgrades.description: Each attack freezes all Bloons everywhere for a short time. Snowstorm freezes all Bloon types for even longer while greatly increasing attack speed of all Ice Monkeys for the duration.

upgrades.name: Re-Freeze
upgrades.description: Can re-freeze Bloons that are already frozen.

upgrades.name: Cryo Cannon
upgrades.description: Rapidly shoots smaller ice bombs over longer range.

upgrades.name: Icicles
upgrades.description: Does bonus damage to MOAB-Class Bloons. Frozen Bloons grow sharp icicles that can pop Bloons that touch them.

upgrades.name: Icicle Impale
upgrades.description: Shoots huge icicle spikes that do huge damage to MOAB-Class Bloons and freezes them.
